summary: Ukrainian FPV drone operators from the 2nd Khartia Corps destroyed a Russian 9K51M Tornado-G multiple launch rocket system, a significant loss due to its long production time and automated fire control system. Russian forces using the "Rubicon" Center reported 173 targets destroyed on April 8, 2026, including Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs and personnel, while the "Elka" anti-aircraft drone performed a kinetic intercept on a Ukrainian fixed-wing UAV, causing critical airframe damage. Ukrainian forces also used FPV drones to kill Russian soldiers, including one who attempted to surrender and flee, and hit two Russian soldiers assaulting positions on motorcycles in the Kostiantynivka direction.
